Index Management

Create Index

                                
                            

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                    Required for sharding. If omitted, Meilisearch will infer it from the first document.
                                

                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Delete Index

                                
                            

                            

                                
Are you sure you want to delete index ?

                                
This action cannot be undone. All documents in this index will be permanently deleted.

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                    

                


                
                

                    

                        

                            
Alias Management

                            
                        

                        
Atomic index aliases for blue-green reindexing and zero-downtime migrations


                        

                            

                                
                                    

                                        Name
                                        Type
                                        Current Target
                                        Version
                                        Created
                                        Actions
                                    

                                
                                
                                    
Loading...

                                
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        
Alias History: 

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Create Alias

                                
                            

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Flip Alias

                                
                            

                            

                                
Flip alias  to a new target:

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                
This atomically updates the alias. All queries will immediately resolve to the new target.

                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Delete Alias

                                
                            

                            

                                
Are you sure you want to delete alias ?

                                
This action cannot be undone. Queries using this alias will fail after deletion.

Advanced Settings

                                

                                    Restart Required: Settings marked with Restart require a pod restart to take effect.

Edit Miroir Settings

                                
                            

                            

                                

                                    Warning: Editing settings directly can cause instability. Changes marked with Restart require a pod restart.
